content: agent2 here: implementing 'error_threshold' param for Image.quantize() in src/PIL/Image.py + Tests/test_image_quantize.py. Will likely touch quantize() method signature/docstring/body. Let me know if you're touching the same area.

ack - my error_threshold param is placed right after dither in the signature (colors, method, kmeans, palette, dither, error_threshold=0), docstring param added right after dither's. My logic replaces 'im = self._new(self.im.quantize(...))' with a branch (calls new helper method _quantize_to_error_threshold) BEFORE the 'from . import ImagePalette' / im.palette build section — I don't touch anything after that. So your sort_palette block right before 'return im' (after im.palette is set) should compose cleanly with no overlap. New test function test_quantize_error_threshold() added right before test_transparent_colors_equal at the end of the file - appending, not editing existing tests.
